name: Cisco Secure Endpoint
description: Monitor Cisco Secure Endpoint (formerly AMP for Endpoints) for device security, malware detection, and security policy compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Cisco Secure Endpoint console
2. Go to Accounts > API Credentials
3. Click New API Credential (3rd Party API type)
4. Note the Client ID and API Key shown
5. Enter Region hostname (api.amp.cisco.com for NA, api.eu.amp.cisco.com for EU, api.apjc.amp.cisco.com for APJC)
6. Enter the Client ID and API Key below

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: API region - use 'api.amp.cisco.com' for North America, 'api.eu.amp.cisco.com' for Europe, or 'api.apjc.amp.cisco.com' for Asia Pacific

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: 3rd Party API Client ID from Cisco Secure Endpoint console

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: API Key from Cisco Secure Endpoint console

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies that endpoint devices are properly protected and monitored by Cisco Secure Endpoint

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Reviews endpoint device inventory and connection status in Cisco Secure Endpoint

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies security event monitoring and policy enforcement across managed endpoints
